displayNameZh: 做产品真的不容易，不是做出来发出去这么简单
summary: Yt Not That Simple component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「做产品真的不容易，不是做出来发出去这么简单」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-not-that-simple/src/YtNotThatSimple.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtNotThatSimple` and `ytNotThatSimpleDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Not That Simple Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-not-that-simple to my project. Preserve the exported YtNotThatSimpleProps API and register the YtNotThatSimple composition with the default props.
